# Ethan Byrne

> Ethan Byrne is a Director of Photography, photographer, and editor based in New York City. He operates Boston Polar Media, a production company with a studio in DUMBO, Brooklyn.

## About

Ethan Byrne (full name: Ethan Jack Smithe Byrne) is a freelance Director of Photography and commercial cinematographer working in New York City. He owns and operates an ARRI ALEXA 35 and specializes in sports, commercial campaigns, and brand storytelling. He has been freelancing since 2022.

He grew up in Boulder, Colorado, attended Boston College (majoring in Philosophy), and moved to New York City to pursue production work full-time. He runs his business as Boston Polar Media (S-Corp), with a production studio at 68 Jay Street in DUMBO, Brooklyn.

## Clients

Nike, NFL, Adidas Football, Bauer Hockey, SharkNinja, Noah NY, NBA, LIV Golf, PGA of America, PGA Tour, New York Jets, NOBULL, NYCFC, Shopify, Omaha Productions, The Ivy League, Boston College

## Specialties

- Director of Photography / Cinematography
- ARRI ALEXA 35 owner/operator
- Sports cinematography and photography
- Commercial and brand video production
- Video editing (DaVinci Resolve)
- Live event and sideline content
- Brand storytelling and campaign work

## Contact

- Email: ethan@bostonpolar.com
- Instagram: @ethan.byrne
- Website: https://ethanbyrne.net
